scope_text: This Standard applies to NextDecade Corporation, its subsidiary Rio Grande LNG (RGLNG), and any other affiliated entity. It applies to every member of the Workforce.
governance_text: This Standard is part of NextDecade's integrated Governance Framework. It is implemented through supporting Procedures and Guidance documents.
exception_text: Exceptions to this Standard require prior written approval from the accountable VP. Requests shall be submitted to HSSE with a documented risk assessment and compensating controls.
continuous_text: This Standard shall be reviewed at least every three years or following any significant incident, regulatory change, or organizational restructuring.
